title: Open Cloze: The World of Penguins

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.10) jednym slowem, tak aby powstal spojny i poprawny logicznie oraz gramatycznie tekst.
tasks.text: Penguins are remarkable creatures that have adapted to some of the harshest environments on Earth. _________ (1.1) there are eighteen recognised species, they vary enormously in size, from the tiny Little Blue Penguin, which stands just 30 centimetres tall, to the Emperor Penguin, _________ (1.2) can reach well over a metre in height. What sets penguins _________ (1.3) from other birds is their complete inability to fly. Instead, their wings have evolved into powerful flippers _________ (1.4) allow them to dive to impressive depths in search of food. Emperor Penguins, in _________ (1.5), are capable of holding their _________ (1.6) for up to twenty minutes while hunting beneath the Antarctic ice. The breeding habits of penguins are equally fascinating. Males often play a key _________ (1.7) in incubating eggs, balancing them on their feet to keep them off the frozen ground. Penguin colonies can number in the hundreds of thousands, and the noise they _________ (1.8) is truly deafening. Sadly, _________ (1.9) to climate change and overfishing, several penguin species now face serious threats to their survival. Conservation efforts are under _________ (1.10) in many parts of the Southern Hemisphere, but scientists warn that much more needs to be done.
